name: Transformer
summary: Deep learning architecture based on self-attention mechanisms, widely used in NLP and computer vision.
use_when: Sequence-to-sequence tasks, language modeling, large-scale feature extraction.
avoid_when: Extremely resource-constrained environments or small datasets where simple ML suffices.
pros: Scales exceptionally well with data size
cons: Quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length
Requires massive datasets to generalize well without pre-training

key_hyperparams.name: d_model
key_hyperparams.note: Dimensionality of input and output layers.

quick_start:
import torch.nn as nn
transformer_model = nn.Transformer(nhead=16, num_encoder_layers=12)
decision_notes: Choose Transformer for maximum parallelization and long-context performance. Use LSTM or Mamba for memory-constrained streaming or when sequential modeling is preferred.
